question_intent: average points scored by top 10 finishers in races held in Australia, considering only constructors from European nations

plan.question_intent: average points scored by top 10 finishers in races held in Australia, considering only constructors from European nations
plan.detail_query: SELECT r.raceid, r.name AS race_name, ci.country, rs.points, c.name AS constructor_name, c.nationality FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS ci ON r.circuitid = ci.circuitid JOIN results AS rs ON r.raceid = rs.raceid JOIN constructors AS c ON rs.constructorid = c.constructorid WHERE (ci.country = 'Australia') AND (rs.positionorder <= 10) AND (rs.points > 0) AND (c.nationality IN ('British', 'French', 'German', 'Spanish', 'Italian', 'Austrian', 'Swedish', 'Dutch', 'Belgian')) GROUP BY r.raceid, r.name, ci.country, rs.points, c.name, c.nationality HAVING (rs.points > 0)

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN circuits AS ci ON r.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN results AS rs ON r.raceid = rs.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON rs.constructorid = c.constructorid
blocks.notes: returns race IDs and points for top 10 finishers in Australian races, considering only European constructors

WHERE (ci.country = 'Australia') AND (rs.positionorder <= 10) AND (rs.points > 0) AND (c.nationality IN ('British', 'French', 'German', 'Spanish', 'Italian', 'Austrian', 'Swedish', 'Dutch', 'Belgian'))
LIMIT 5

SELECT r.raceid, rs.points
FROM races AS r
JOIN circuits AS ci ON r.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN results AS rs ON r.raceid = rs.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON rs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country = 'Australia') AND (rs.positionorder <= 10) AND (rs.points > 0) AND (c.nationality IN ('British', 'French', 'German', 'Spanish', 'Italian', 'Austrian', 'Swedish', 'Dutch', 'Belgian'))
GROUP BY r.raceid, rs.points
HAVING (rs.points > 0)

FROM races AS r

JOIN results AS rs ON r.raceid = rs.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON rs.constructorid = c.constructorid

GROUP BY r.raceid, rs.points
HAVING (rs.points > 0)

build_logs.notes: computes the average points scored by top 10 finishers in Australian races, considering only European constructors

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT r.raceid, rs.points
FROM races AS r
JOIN circuits AS ci ON r.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN results AS rs ON r.raceid = rs.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON rs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country = 'Australia') AND (rs.positionorder <= 10) AND (rs.points > 0) AND (c.nationality IN ('British', 'French', 'German', 'Spanish', 'Italian', 'Austrian', 'Swedish', 'Dutch', 'Belgian'))
GROUP BY r.raceid, rs.points
HAVING (rs.points > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT r.raceid, rs.points
FROM races AS r
JOIN circuits AS ci ON r.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN results AS rs ON r.raceid = rs.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON rs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country = 'Australia') AND (rs.positionorder <= 10) AND (rs.points > 0) AND (c.nationality IN ('British', 'French', 'German', 'Spanish', 'Italian', 'Austrian', 'Swedish', 'Dutch', 'Belgian'))
GROUP BY r.raceid, rs.points
HAVING (rs.points > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.points) AS average_points_per_constructor
FROM (SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, cr.points
FROM constructorresults cr
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits ci ON r.circuitid = ci.circuitid
WHERE (ci.country = 'Australia')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of points scored per race by top-10 finishers from European constructors in Australian races?
